user.title: Lemon TTS Connection
user.description: Enter your Lemon TTS server URL and API key. Speaker list will be fetched automatically and a TTS entity will be created for each speaker.

data_description.api_url: Base URL of the Lemon TTS API server (e.g. https://your-server.example.com)
data_description.api_key: API key used for Bearer authentication
data_description.mute_entity: Entity ID to control TTS ON/OFF. Leave empty to always play. (e.g. input_boolean.tts_enabled)
data_description.mute_state: TTS plays when the entity state matches this value. (default: on)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Lemon TTS
reconfigure.description: Update server URL, API key, or mute settings.

data_description.api_url: Base URL of the Lemon TTS API server (e.g. https://your-server.example.com)
data_description.api_key: API key used for Bearer authentication
data_description.mute_entity: Entity ID to control TTS ON/OFF. Leave empty to always play. (e.g. input_boolean.tts_enabled)
data_description.mute_state: TTS plays when the entity state matches this value. (default: on)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to server. Check the URL and API key.
